H3200.derivation: patronymically from H3199 (יָכִין)lemma יִכִין first vowel, corrected to יָכִין;
H3200.strongs_def: a Jakinite (collectively) or descendants of Jakin

H3201.strongs_def: to be able, literally (can, could) or morally (may, might)
H3201.kjv_def: be able, any at all (ways), attain, can (away with, (-not)), could, endure, might, overcome, have power, prevail, still, suffer.
H3201.usage: could(46x), able(43x), cannot(34x), prevail(22x), may(16x), can(12x), canst(5x), endure(2x), might(2x)

H3202.strongs_def: {to be able, literally (can, could) or morally (may, might)}

H3203.derivation: and יְכׇלְיָהוּ; or (2 Chronicles 26:3) יְכִילְיָה; from H3201 (יָכֹל) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah will enable;

H3204.derivation: and יְכׇנְיָהוּ; or (Jeremiah 27:20) יְכוֹנְיָה; from H3559 (כּוּן) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah will establish;

H3205.strongs_def: to bear young; causatively, to beget; medically, to act as midwife; specifically, to show lineage
H3205.kjv_def: bear, beget, birth(-day), born, (make to) bring forth (children, young), bring up, calve, child, come, be delivered (of a child), time of delivery, gender, hatch, labour, (do the office of a) midwife, declare pedigrees, be the son of, (woman in, woman that) travail(-eth, -ing woman).
H3205.usage: beget(201x), bare(110x), born(79x), bear(23x), travail(16x), midwife(10x), child(8x), delivered(5x), borne(3x), birth(2x), labour(2x)

H3206.strongs_def: something born, i.e. a lad or offspring
H3206.kjv_def: boy, child, fruit, son, young man (one).

H3212.strongs_def: to walk (literally or figuratively); causatively, to carry (in various senses)
H3212.kjv_def: [idiom] again, away, bear, bring, carry (away), come (away), depart, flow, [phrase] follow(-ing), get (away, hence, him), (cause to, made) go (away, -ing, -ne, one's way, out), grow, lead (forth), let down, march, prosper, [phrase] pursue, cause to run, spread, take away (-journey), vanish, (cause to) walk(-ing), wax, [idiom] be weak.
H3212.usage: go(628x), walk(122x), come(77x), depart(66x), follow(20x), get(14x), lead(17x), brought(8x), carry(5x), bring(4x)

H3213.strongs_def: to howl (with a wailing tone) or yell (with a boisterous one)

H3217.derivation: from an unused root apparently meaning to stick or scrape;

H3218.derivation: from an unused root meaning to lick up;
H3218.strongs_def: a devourer; specifically, the young locust

H3219.strongs_def: a travelling pouch (as if for gleanings)

H3220.derivation: from an unused root meaning to roar;
H3220.strongs_def: a sea (as breaking in noisy surf) or large body of water; specifically (with the article), the Mediterranean Sea; sometimes a large river, or an artifical basin; locally, the west, or (rarely) the south

H3221.strongs_def: {a sea (as breaking in noisy surf) or large body of water; specifically (with the article), the Mediterranean Sea; sometimes a large river, or an artifical basin; locally, the west, or (rarely) the south}

H3223.derivation: from H3117 (יוֹם) and H410 (אֵל); day of God;

H3224.derivation: perhaps from the same as H3117 (יוֹם); properly, warm, i.e. affectionate; hence, dove (compare H3123 (יוֹנָה));

H3225.strongs_def: the right hand or side (leg, eye) of a person or other object (as the stronger and more dexterous); locally, the south

H3226.strongs_def: Jamin, the name of three Israelites

H3228.strongs_def: a Jeminite (collectively) or descendants of Jamin

H3230.derivation: from H4427 (מָלַךְ); he will make king;

H3231.derivation: a primitive root; to be (physically) right (i.e. firm); but used only as denominative from H3225 (יָמִין) and transitive,
H3231.strongs_def: to be right-handed or take the right-hand side
H3231.kjv_def: go (turn) to (on, use) the right hand.

H3232.derivation: from H3231 (יָמַן); prosperity (as betokened by the right hand);
H3232.strongs_def: Jimnah, the name of two Israelites; also (with the article) of the posterity of one of them

H3235.strongs_def: to exchange; by implication, to change places

H3238.strongs_def: to rage or be violent; by implication, to suppress, to maltreat
H3238.kjv_def: destroy, (thrust out by) oppress(-ing, -ion, -or), proud, vex, do violence.
H3238.usage: oppress(11x), vex(4x), destroy(1x), oppressor(1x), proud(1x), oppression(1x)

H3239.strongs_def: Janoach or Janochah, a place in Palestine

H3240.strongs_def: to deposit; by implication, to allow to stay
H3240.kjv_def: bestow, cast down, lay (down, up), leave (off), let alone (remain), pacify, place, put, set (down), suffer, withdraw, withhold. (The Hiphil forms with the dagesh are here referred to, in accordance with the older grammarians; but if any distinction of the kind is to be made, these should rather be referred to H5117 (נוּחַ), and the others here.)
H3240.usage: leave(24x), up(10x), lay(8x), suffer(5x), place(4x), put(4x), set(4x), bestowed(1x), pacifieth(1x), still(1x), withdraw(1x), withhold(1x)

H3243.strongs_def: to suck; causatively, to give milk
H3243.kjv_def: milch, nurse(-ing mother), (give, make to) suck(-ing child, -ling).

H3244.derivation: or יַנְשׁוֹף; apparently from H5398 (נָשַׁף); (compare H5399 (נֶשֶׁף))
H3244.strongs_def: an unclean (acquatic) bird; probably the heron (perhaps from its blowing cry, or because the nightheron is meant ))

H3245.strongs_def: to set (literally or figuratively); intensively, to found; reflexively, to sit down together, i.e. settle, consult
H3245.kjv_def: appoint, take counsel, establish, (lay the, lay for a) found(-ation), instruct, lay, ordain, set, [idiom] sure.
H3245.usage: foundation(15x), lay(8x), founded(8x), ordain(2x), counsel(2x), established(2x), appointed(1x), instructed(1x), set(1x), sure(1x)

H3252.derivation: from an unused root meaning to watch; observant;

H3253.derivation: from H5564 (סָמַךְ) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah will sustain;

H3254.strongs_def: to add or augment (often adverbial, to continue to do a thing)
H3254.kjv_def: add, [idiom] again, [idiom] any more, [idiom] cease, [idiom] come more, [phrase] conceive again, continue, exceed, [idiom] further, [idiom] gather together, get more, give more-over, [idiom] henceforth, increase (more and more), join, [idiom] longer (bring, do, make, much, put), [idiom] (the, much, yet) more (and more), proceed (further), prolong, put, be (strong-) er, [idiom] yet, yield.
H3254.usage: more(70x), again(54x), add(28x), increase(16x), also(6x), exceed(4x), put(4x), further(4x), henceforth(4x), can(2x), continued(2x), give(2x)

H3255.strongs_def: {to add or augment (often adverbial, to continue to do a thing)}

H3256.strongs_def: to chastise, literally (with blows) or figuratively (with words); hence, to instruct
H3256.kjv_def: bind, chasten, chastise, correct, instruct, punish, reform, reprove, sore, teach.
H3256.usage: chastise(21x), instruct(8x), correct(7x), taught(2x), bound(1x), punish(1x), reformed(1x), reproveth(1x), sore(1x)

H3258.derivation: from an unused root probably meaning to grieve; sorrowful;
H3258.strongs_def: Jabets, the name of an Israelite, and also of a place in Palestine

H3259.strongs_def: to fix upon (by agreement or appointment); by implication, to meet (at a stated time), to summon (to trial), to direct (in a certain quarter or position), to engage (for marriage)
H3259.kjv_def: agree,(maxke an) appoint(-ment, a time), assemble (selves), betroth, gather (selves, together), meet (together), set (a time).
H3259.usage: meet(7x), together(5x), assemble(4x), appointed(3x), set(3x), time(2x), betrothed(2x), agreed(1x), appointment(1x), gather(1x)

H3262.derivation: from H3261 (יָעָה) and H410 (אֵל); carried away of God;
H3262.strongs_def: Jeuel, the name of four Israelites

H3265.derivation: apparently the passive participle of the same as H3293 (יַעַר); wooded;

H3266.strongs_def: Jeush, the name of an Edomite and of four Israelites

H3268.derivation: from H3267 (יָעַז) and H410 (אֵל); emboldened of God;

H3269.derivation: from H3267 (יָעַז) and H3050 (יָהּ); emboldened of Jah;

H3270.strongs_def: Jaazer or Jazer, a place East of the Jordan

H3273.derivation: from H3261 (יָעָה) and H410 (אֵל); carried away of God;
H3273.strongs_def: Jeiel, the name of six Israelites

H3274.strongs_def: Jeish, the name of an Edomite and of a an Israelite

H3275.derivation: from the same as H5912 (עָכָן); troublesome;

H3276.strongs_def: properly, to ascend; figuratively, to be valuable (objectively; useful, subjectively; benefited)
H3276.kjv_def: [idiom] at all, set forward, can do good, (be, have) profit, (able).

H3279.derivation: or יַעֲלָה; the same as H3280 (יַעֲלָה) or direct from H3276 (יַעַל);
H3279.strongs_def: Jaala or Jaalah, one of the Nethinim

H3282.derivation: from an unused root meaning to pay attention;
H3282.strongs_def: properly, heed; by implication, purpose (sake or account); used adverbially to indicate the reason or cause
H3282.kjv_def: because (that), forasmuch ([phrase] as), seeing then, [phrase] that, [phrase] wheras, [phrase] why.

H3283.strongs_def: the ostrich (probably from its answering cry

H3284.derivation: feminine of H3283 (יָעֵן), and meaning the same

H3285.derivation: from the same as H3283 (יָעֵן); responsive;

H3286.strongs_def: to tire (as if from wearisome flight)

H3289.strongs_def: to advise; reflexively, to deliberate or resolve
H3289.kjv_def: advertise, take advise, advise (well), consult, (give, take) counsel(-lor), determine, devise, guide, purpose.
H3289.usage: counsel(25x), counsellor(22x), consult(9x), give(7x), purposed(5x), advice(2x), determined(2x), advise(2x), deviseth(2x), taken(2x)

H3293.derivation: from an unused root probably meaning to thicken with verdure;
H3293.strongs_def: a copse of bushes; hence, a forest; hence, honey in the comb (as hived in trees)

H3295.derivation: feminine of H3293 (יַעַר), and meaning the same
H3295.strongs_def: {a copse of bushes; hence, a forest; hence, honey in the comb (as hived in trees)}

H3296.derivation: from the plural of H3293 (יַעַר) and the masculine plural active participle of H707 (אָרַג); woods of weavers;

H3298.derivation: from an unused root of uncertain signification and H3050 (יָהּ);
